## Skill Affected

<!-- Which skill pack should be improved? (e.g., bioinformatics, image-analysis, core) -->

## Current Behavior

<!-- What does the skill currently recommend or not cover? -->

## Desired Behavior

<!-- What should it recommend instead, or what should be added? -->

## Context

<!-- Why is this improvement needed? What situation exposed the gap? -->

## Proposed Changes

<!-- If you have specific text changes in mind, include them here. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I've reviewed the current skill pack conventions
- [ ] This doesn't conflict with other conventions (or I've noted the conflict)
- [ ] I can provide a real-world example supporting this change
